subject: [PATCH pynfs v2 14/25] server41tests: add test for RENAME event notifications

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite for verifying that the NFSv4.1 server sends correct RENAME event notifications when a file is renamed from one client to another. The test creates a directory delegation that accepts notification of RENAME events, and then renames a file from one client to another. It verifies that the server sends a CB_NOTIFY with the correct RENAME event details.
